arguments.argument:
//----- Gate 1: Mario World ----- event_inherited() enemyCount=-1 fadeColor=c_white if global.gameProgress=150 fadeAlpha=1 else fadeAlpha=0
if room=rMario1_CCc { xScrollSpd=2 autoScroll=instance_create(240,176,oMisc) autoScroll.type=0 autoScroll.sprite_index=sNull view_object[0]=autoScroll } else if room=rMario1_CCBoss circleRad=0
